cli.root.long:
convertr orchestrates pandoc, ffmpeg, LibreOffice, ImageMagick and other backends
to convert files between any supported formats via a format graph with BFS routing.
cli.convert.long:
Convert one or more files. Input can be files, directories, globs, or stdin.
The output format is inferred from the -o extension or --to flag.
cli.formats.short: List supported formats and conversion graph
cli.backends.short: List conversion backends and their status
cli.watch.short: Watch a directory and convert on changes
doctor.has_missing: Some backends are missing. Run `convertr doctor` for details.
error.no_route: no conversion route found from {{.From}} to {{.To}}
